experiment_description: Paper-aligned one-shot detector-error-conditioned FN/FP rule selection and follow-up outer Aggregator validation.
outer_exposure_limitation: The TASK-037E outer partition is a previously exposed follow-up validation partition. Rule generation used only the generation partition and rule selection used only the inner partition, but the broader experiment design followed prior inspection of outer results. Therefore TASK-037E does not support an untouched confirmatory superiority claim.
